name: register_user
description: Register an existing user to an application. This creates the association between a user and an app, assigns roles, and enables the user to log into that application.

parameters.name: registration.applicationId
parameters.description: The UUID of the application to register the user to.

parameters.name: registration.userId
parameters.description: The UUID of the user to register. Can also be passed as a path parameter.

parameters.name: registration.roles
parameters.description: Roles to assign to the user for this application.

parameters.name: registration.username
parameters.description: A username for this user specific to this application.

parameters.name: registration.data
parameters.description: Custom data to store with this registration.
